# zstack_dataset (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage datasets in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model_center_uuid` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `url` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `system` (Boolean)
- `token` (String, Sensitive)

### Read-Only

- `install_path` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `uuid` (String)
